properties.title: Common land use on Pond Knob
properties.body_md: Pond Knob, near Rock Creek and Dry Creek, was a popular destination for camping, four-wheeling and community meeting places because of its natural beauty.  Pond Knob also has a deep historical and cultural significance for Coal River Valley. A Native American hunting trail passed through Indian Gap on Pond Knob, and the remains of these hunting parties can be found in arrowheads and burial mounds on the mountain.
